name: Marketing Spend Dashboard
description: Walk into the board meeting knowing exactly what you spent, what came back, what it cost to acquire, and whether efficiency is improving.
alsoSurfaces: What did we spend on marketing this quarter — and where did it go?
How is CAC trending vs. payback period?
Are paid efficiency curves bending the right way?
Which spend categories should I cut first if we have to?
beforeWeRun: Which spend categories — paid media only, or include people/events/tools?
Define "return" — pipeline, closed-won, or both side-by-side?
Comparison window — QoQ, YoY, or rolling 4-quarter?

whatYoullGet.name: Spend KPIs
whatYoullGet.desc: Total marketing spend, cost-per-pipeline-dollar, CAC, payback period — with QoQ deltas.

whatYoullGet.name: Category breakdown
whatYoullGet.desc: Spend allocation across paid, events, tools, and people; trended.

whatYoullGet.name: Efficiency curves
whatYoullGet.desc: CAC and payback period over the last 8 quarters with a target line.

whatYoullGet.name: Top categories by return
whatYoullGet.desc: Ranked list of categories by ROAS and pipeline-dollar return.

whatYoullGet.name: Drill-down detail
whatYoullGet.desc: Click any category to see the campaigns and channels inside.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your spend dashboard in ~9 min.
